title: spathelia glabrescens
intro: Spathelia glabrescens is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Rutaceae family and commonly known as the African rue or West African rue. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antioxidant, due to the presence of bioactive compounds like limonoids and flavonoids. Spathelia glabrescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
